name: apye
description: This service handles the creation of annual percentage yield calculations, supporting two distinct feature types — APYE and APY. For APYE requests, it fetches interest ledger data for a given account and date range from a retrieval client, extracting interest earned and average principal values. For APY requests, it retrieves the applicable interest rate and currency, applies an interest formula via a transformation engine, and calculates the interest amount. Once interest data is established, the service computes the yield calculation using a dedicated yield engine: for APYE, it calculates the annualised yield based on average balance (returning zero if the balance is zero), and for APY, it determines the yield over a 365- or 366-day base period depending on whether the year is a leap year (returning zero if the principal is zero). The computed result is wrapped in a response entity and, after validating that a valid response object is present, returned to the caller with an HTTP 201 Created status.
